summary: Brandi Bynum, Program Manager of the DHS Blue Campaign, speaks direct-to-camera against a blue curtain with a name plate and subtitles, intercut with plain informational text-card slides listing the Blue Campaign's long-term outcomes. It is a speech-driven awareness explainer with no music, genre styling, or fast-cut spectacle. Out of scope.
notable_text: Lower third 'BRANDI BYNUM, PROGRAM MANAGER, BLUE CAMPAIGN'; slide 'Blue Campaign Long-Term Outcomes: Decreasing Human Trafficking Victimization / Deterring Human Trafficking / Increasing Law Enforcement's Abilities / Increase Awareness'
